description: CompositionPink running shorts made of Dri-Fit polyester with an in-built underwear, has grey mesh panels on the sides, embroidered swoosh logo, and a soft elastic waistband with a concealed drawstring FittingConfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursUse mild detergentDo not bleachLine dry inside-out in shadeCool iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry cleanMake your training sessions all the more peaceful and comfortable in these shorts from nike. The soft and wide waistband sits perfectly on your waist without irritating your skin, while the drawstring allows you to customise the fit. Engineered with Dri-fit technology, this shorts keeps you dry and fresh even after a gruelling session of yoga or workout at the gym, while the side mesh panels enhance ventilation. And when you are not at the gym, pair it with a light and bright T-shirt and chill out.
